## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is within the current project scope.
- [ ] Fixtures were added or updated for classification changes.
- [ ] README/docs were updated when user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] JSON output remains stable or the breaking change is intentional.
